stemHtml: Which statement is correct regarding the required serviceability checks of a Direct Reading Compass (DRC) before departure?

options.a: Check that the compass rose deflects to the left when the aircraft turns left.
options.b: Check its physical condition, verify that the heading increases when turning right, and cross-check the compass reading with the runway heading during line-up.
options.c: Check that the compass rose remains stationary when turning.
options.d: Check that the compass reading matches the flight director heading.
